description: Fail-closed enforcement phases (P-*) + auto-fail codes (AF-AV-*) for the Avatar-Alchemist brand pipeline. Every phase maps to a stdlib prover; every AF code has a negative fixture in test_aa_preflight.py. A gate without a failing test does not ship.

phases.desc: schema-complete, non-boilerplate intake before any dispatch
version in {book,brand} explicitly set; question set matches version; book routes to skill 53 or parks book-skill-not-available. No default, no inference, no cross-version fallback.
generation-completeness: all required brand generators ran -> their output artifacts exist, non-empty, sha256 recorded.

stripped-length word floors (per-stage minimums in AA-PIPELINE-MANIFEST.json, e.g. >=1300 avatar-q1-30, >=850 blended tone, >=550 each awareness, >=1600 booking bot). Measured on whitespace/markdown-stripped text so padding cannot fake it. Floors are MINIMUMS a real client LLM run naturally exceeds; they were lowered from an earlier inflated set that forced the golden fixture to pad — the deliverables are now majority hand-authored, header-answering content.
exactly 39 image prompts; Top-39 = 3x13; headline doc = 12+12+12; each ad set = 10 ads.
image-prompt artifacts stripped-char band [5000,19000]; no repeated artist/photographer/producer token.

REPAIR-GATED (R4): enforced ONLY when the run set apply_repairs=true (--apply-repairs). Each of the 13 ad-set artifacts must then match its restored R4 category signature (proves the 'category 2' drift repair holds). In the DEFAULT (faithful-to-live) run this invariant is not enforced (live behavior froze on 'category 2').

FAIL-SOFT (PRD 7 / O4): stage 02 (avatar-questions-31-32) emits 10 podcasts + 10 TED talks with links. aa_links_gate.py does a bounded HTTP check (timeout + one retry) per link; every link either verifies or the stage is stamped 'degraded:search' in a G-LINKS receipt. Offline/unreachable degrades (never blocks). Fail-CLOSED only when the stage-02 artifact is empty/absent (AF-AV-LINKS-MISSING).

bot docs carry H1 '# ... Section' skeleton + XML-style labels + {{contact.*}} merge tags (the one whitelisted placeholder class); on stages 19/20/21 every quoted, sendable bot message stays within the manifest floors.bot_msg_char_cap (550 stripped chars).
hero page contains the 12 EXACTLY-NAMED, IN-ORDER 'Trevor Otts Hero Page System' sections (name/order/count enforced, no any-heading fallback), each inside its char/word band.

deterministic section-header/body relevance: the 13 named Avatar Q1-30 questions and the 'Five Core Values'/'Five Personality Traits' marketing sections must actually answer their header (keyword classes present / >=5 distinctly named items), not generic on-topic prose that ignores the specific ask.

fail-closed egress/entry-bypass ban: no prover may import an egress-capable module (urllib.request, http.client, socket, smtplib, requests, httpx, aiohttp, ...) unless on the narrow read-only-link-check allowlist, and even then never a POST-shaped call; no reference to a known third-party webhook/API host (n8n/Airtable/Slack/Drive/Gmail); no subprocess curl/wget/nc. Wired into entry.sh (front door), aa_director.py (in-process re-verify at dispatch), and test_aa_preflight.py.
no unresolved {{...}} / $('...') / Make.com tokens in any artifact (whitelist: {{contact.*}} merge tags in bot docs).
every resolved model id in the run ledger fails /anthropic|claude/i; no operator credential names in the run env.

provenance/no-fabrication: 40/40 foreman-attested receipts LOADED FROM DISK whose sha256 matches artifact bytes READ FROM DISK; content prover re-run by the gate itself against the on-disk run; a detached HMAC-signed QC certificate (aa_qc_cert.py, verifier != author) bound to this run_id with score >= 8.5; a required + consumed front-door nonce; a live gate-integrity re-check; the delivered folder's per-file sha256 bound into the cert. Certificate signature is HMAC-SHA256 keyed by the per-run foreman key (entry.sh-minted, never embedded in the cert). 'Done' only with a certificate that PASSES `aa_delivery_gate.py --verify-cert`.

af_codes.AF-AV-VERSION-UNSET: version unset/empty or not exactly book|brand
af_codes.AF-AV-VERSION-MISMATCH: answered question set mismatches the selected version
af_codes.AF-AV-BOOK-SKILL-MISSING: version=book with no resolvable Book-skill route (parks book-skill-not-available)
af_codes.AF-AV-STAGE-MISSING: a required brand-pipeline stage produced no non-empty artifact / receipt
af_codes.AF-AV-FLOOR: an artifact is under its stripped-word floor
af_codes.AF-AV-COUNT-39: image-prompt / top-39 artifact does not carry exactly 39 numbered items (3x13)
af_codes.AF-AV-COUNT-HEADLINE: headline doc is not 12 headlines + 12 short-form + 12 long-form
af_codes.AF-AV-ADCOUNT: an ad set does not carry 10 ads
af_codes.AF-AV-IMG-BAND: image-prompt artifact outside the stripped-char band [5000,19000]
af_codes.AF-AV-UNIQUE-ARTIST: a repeated artist/photographer/producer token across image prompts
af_codes.AF-AV-ADSET-CAT: REPAIR-GATED (R4, --apply-repairs only): an ad-set artifact does not match its restored R4 category signature ('category 2' drift). Not enforced in the default faithful-to-live run.
af_codes.AF-AV-LINKS-MISSING: stage 02 (avatar-questions-31-32) produced no non-empty artifact for the podcast/TED link check (G-LINKS fail-closed). Unverifiable-but-present links degrade to 'degraded:search', they do not fail.
af_codes.AF-AV-BOTDOC: a bot doc is missing the H1 section skeleton / XML labels / merge-tag rules
af_codes.AF-AV-BOTMSG-CAP: a bot-instruction stage (19/20/21) carries a quoted, sendable bot message over the manifest floors.bot_msg_char_cap (550 stripped chars) — messages must stay short and mobile-first
af_codes.AF-AV-HERO-12: hero page is missing/misnamed/out-of-order/miscounted vs the 12 EXACTLY-NAMED Trevor Otts Hero Page System sections (no any-heading fallback)
af_codes.AF-AV-HERO-BAND: a present, correctly-named hero section is outside its char/word band
af_codes.AF-AV-SECTION-RELEVANCE: a section body does not answer its own header (generic on-topic prose standing in for a factual/named-list answer) — Avatar Q1-30's 13 questions or a 'Five Core Values'/'Five Personality Traits' list with <5 named items
af_codes.AF-AV-EGRESS: an ungoverned egress path: a prover imports a networking module outside the narrow read-only allowlist, contains a POST-shaped call, references a known third-party webhook/API host (n8n/Airtable/Slack/Drive/Gmail), or shells out to curl/wget/nc
af_codes.AF-AV-PLACEHOLDER: an unresolved template/Make.com token leaked into an artifact
af_codes.AF-AV-NOANTHROPIC: a resolved model id matches /anthropic|claude/i, OR a manifest stage has NO resolved model id at all (fail-closed on omission — a ledger cannot pass by leaving a stage's model id out), or an operator credential name is present
af_codes.AF-AV-PROVENANCE: a receipt sha256 (loaded from disk) does not match its artifact bytes (loaded from disk) — fabrication / tamper
af_codes.AF-AV-DELIVER-INCOMPLETE: delivery attempted below 40/40 on-disk attested receipts, or the content prover (re-run by the gate) failed
af_codes.AF-AV-CERT-NO-FRONT-DOOR: no valid front-door nonce for this run — a certificate cannot be minted outside a run entry.sh actually started
af_codes.AF-AV-CERT-GATE-DRIFT: the live gate-integrity re-check failed at certificate-issuance time (a pinned gate is currently modified)
af_codes.AF-AV-CERT-UNSIGNED: no valid per-run foreman signing key (.foreman-key, minted only by entry.sh) — a certificate cannot be HMAC-signed
af_codes.AF-AV-CERT-QC-INVALID: the detached QC-CERTIFICATE.json (aa_qc_cert.py) is missing, its signature does not verify, its run_id does not bind to this run, its content_gate_pass is false, or its score is below the 8.5 floor
af_codes.AF-AV-DELIVERY-MISMATCH: a shipped deliverable file's on-disk sha256 does not match aa_package.py's own MANIFEST.json claim (swapped/tampered deliverable)

gate_integrity.note: manifest + prover sha256 pinned in AA-GATE-HASHES.json; both aa_director.py (at dispatch) and aa_delivery_gate.py (at cert issuance) call the check IN-PROCESS, right now, regardless of the caller-supplied nonce — modified gates are refused, not merely 'checked once by entry.sh'.
